workflow.name: Publish blog posts from YouTube transcripts to WordPress and Telegram with Gemini
workflow.description:
## Who is this for?

Content creators, media teams, and bloggers who run a YouTube channel and want to automatically repurpose video content into SEO-ready blog posts — without manual writing. Ideal for anyone publishing news or educational content in any language.

## What it does

This workflow runs three fully automated pipelines that take a YouTube video all the way to a published WordPress post:

**Pipeline 1 — Transcript Collector** runs on a schedule, fetches new videos from your YouTube playlist via the YouTube Data API, retrieves their full transcripts via RapidAPI, saves each transcript to a Google Doc, and logs metadata to Google Sheets.

**Pipeline 2 — AI Blog Generator** picks up unprocessed transcripts, sends them to a Gemini AI Agent that reads the transcript and your existing published posts (for internal linking), then generates structured blog content: title, body (HTML), summary, tags, Telegram caption, image prompt, and publish priority. Results are saved to a second Google Sheet as `pending`.

**Pipeline 3 — Publisher** runs every 3 hours, selects the highest-priority pending post (urgent > normal > evergreen), publishes it to WordPress, generates a featured image via an AI image API, uploads and attaches it to the post, then announces it to a Telegram channel.

## How to set up

1. Import this workflow into n8n.
2. Create two Google Sheets tabs: `youtubeVideos` and `blogsAndNewsUploaded` (column structures in the sticky notes).
3. Configure all credentials: Google (Sheets, Docs), YouTube API key, RapidAPI key (youtube-transcript3), Gemini API, WordPress, Telegram Bot, and your AI image generation API.
4. Set your YouTube Playlist ID in the first HTTP node.
5. Set your Google Drive Folder ID for transcript storage.
6. Activate all three schedule triggers independently.

## Requirements

- YouTube Data API v3 key (Google Cloud Console)
- RapidAPI subscription to `youtube-transcript3`
- Google Gemini API key
- WordPress site with Application Password
- Telegram Bot token + channel
- AI image generation API (compatible with OpenAI images format)

## How to customize

- Adjust the Gemini system prompt in the AI Agent node to change content language, tone, or structure.
- Change `publish_priority` logic in the JS node to control posting frequency.
- Swap the image generation API with any provider (DALL-E, Stability AI, etc.).
- Add a Filter node before publishing to require manual approval of `pending` posts.

parameters.content:
##Publish Post from YouTube transcripts to WordPress & Telegram

### How it works

1. Triggers schedule to fetch YouTube playlist items via API.
2. Parses items to identify new videos and append them to a Google Sheet.
3. Fetches transcripts, processes, and stores them in Google Docs.
4. Generates blog content from YouTube videos using AI, saving updates to Google Sheets.
5. Publishes processed blog content to WordPress, including featured image creation and uploading.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Ensure Google Sheets API credentials are configured.
- [ ] Set up Telegram credentials for notifications.
- [ ] Configure YouTube API access for fetching playlist items.
- [ ] Set up access to the AI service for content and image generation.
- [ ] Set WordPress credentials for post publishing.

## Schedule and fetch YouTube

This group triggers the workflow and fetches YouTube playlist items.

## Process YouTube videos

Splits playlist items, extracts video IDs, and filters new videos against existing data.

## Log new videos

Appends new video information to a Google Sheet.

## Fetch and aggregate transcript

Fetches YouTube transcript using an API and aggregates lines for processing.

## Process transcript text

Cleans and combines transcript lines before saving them to Google Docs.

## Save and notify transcript

Saves the transcript link to Google Sheets and sends a notification.

## Schedule and get videos

Schedules the blog content generation and retrieves video data from Google Sheets.

## Filter and update video state

Filters unprocessed videos and marks them as processing in Google Sheets.

## AI content generation

Generates blog content from transcripts using AI and reads required references.

## Process AI output

Parses AI output and saves the blog content to Google Sheets.

## Notify content generation

Notifies via Telegram when content is generated.

## Schedule and get posts

Schedules publishing to WordPress and fetches pending posts.

## Select and publish post

Selects the post for publishing and submits it to WordPress.

## Generate and process image

Generates, downloads, and processes the featured image for posts.

## Upload and attach image

Uploads the processed image to WordPress and attaches it to the post.

## Publish and notify post

Posts the final content on Telegram and marks it as published in Google Sheets.

parameters.text: Call your available tools, analyze the content, and produce a JSON output. The output must be ONLY a JSON array — nothing else.

options.systemMessage:
You are a professional AI content analyst and writer for a Persian-language media outlet. You have access to two tools:
1. **Google Docs Tool** — read the YouTube video transcript
2. **blogsAndNewsUploaded_Read** — read previously published articles for internal linking

Call both tools, then produce structured JSON blog posts from the transcript. Output must be ONLY a valid JSON array.

parameters.text: ✅ Blog content generation complete for video transcript.

user.name: Erfan Iranshad
user.bio:
AI Automation Engineer with 3 years of experience building production-grade automation
systems for US and regional clients. Delivered 100+ end-to-end systems across healthcare,
SaaS, e-commerce, HR, and finance. Founder of n8napp.ir with 250+ active users. Specializes
in voice AI, workflow orchestration, CRM integration, and intelligent business process
automation.

data.details:
The Edit Image node allows you to manipulate and edit images. Use this node when you want to:

- Blur an image
- Add a border to an image
- Create a new image
- Crop an image
- Composite an image on top of another
- Draw on an image
- Get information about the image
- Rotate an image
- Change the size of an image
- Shear an image along the X or Y axis
- Add text to the image

data.details: The Code node allows you to execute JavaScript in your workflow.

The Filter node can be used to filter items based on a condition. If the condition is met, the item will be passed on to the next node. If the condition is not met, the item will be omitted. Conditions can be combined together by AND(meet all conditions), or OR(meet at least one condition).
